content.en:
"Finally raised the Eternal Dao Species to its current limit!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In this way, he could condense the sixth perfect level Eternal Realm Spirit, and once the condensation was successful, his cultivation would also be raised to the middle level peak realm of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and his strength would be greatly improved.

At that time, his combat power would be comparable to that of a high-level realm god who had condensed the eight Eternal Realm Spirits.

......

After that, he began his retreat to impact the sixth perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

He thought that he could easily condense success, but he didn't expect that after preparing a lot of resources, he still failed.

Obviously, the success rate of condensing the sixth perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit is not very high.

Even a treasure like the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit could hardly increase the success rate by much.

In the realm of the realm gods, those realm gods condensed the eternal realm spirit, which one did not fail a few times? Some even failed dozens of times, relying on endless years to hit the bottleneck again and again, so that they could successfully condense the eternal realm spirit.

There are even many realm gods who failed to break through, causing the Yong 05 Constant Dao Demon Seed to turn into a demon seed.

Because of this, the endless years of many realm gods have passed, and their cultivation has not changed.

Like Ye Tian, it was simply too rebellious to easily raise his cultivation to this level.

"If you fail once, you will reunite and replicate your body, and continue to impact the second time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, he didn't have any resources to prepare, otherwise if he failed, it would be a waste of resources.

Those resources might as well be kept for their wives and children, after all, they don't have a copy body, and once the impact fails, they won't be able to continue to condense the Eternal Realm Spirit for a long time.

Therefore, his subsequent breakthroughs do not use resources as much as possible, unless there is no success rate at all, and he will prepare resources to assist the breakthrough.

But obviously, his success rate of breakthrough now cannot be zero.

Therefore, as long as you impact a few more times, there is a high probability that you will be able to break through.

......

Two failures!

Five failures!

Ten failures!

Finally, when he failed for the twelfth time, he finally succeeded in condensing the sixth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

This sixth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit was the Tianyan Giant Ape Realm Spirit, and he used this Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit when he used the Spirit Rank Realm God Replica Body to attack Tianhe Dao Mountain.

Now, the Tianhe Dao Mountain has been destroyed, and he will naturally not expose anything with this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

"Condensing the sixth Perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit, the success rate is so low, and when the seventh Eternal Realm Spirit is condensed in the future, the success rate will be even lower!" Ye Tian muttered.

But he was still very early from impacting the Eternal Realm God Realm high-level Realm Divine Cultivator, so he didn't have to worry about this problem.

"The Eternal Dao Seed is weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, he felt that his Eternal Dao Seed was weak to the limit, after all, he didn't use the treasure to break through with the assistance this time, so naturally he couldn't recover the Eternal Dao Seed.

In the following days, Ye Tian slowly recovered the Eternal Dao Species, striving to survive this long period of weakness.

......

Ten billion years after the Dao Era.

At this time.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed recovered and was no longer weak.

Subsequently, he tried to refine the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance to see if he could continue to improve the Eternal Dao Seed.

But he frowned suddenly.

"It's useless!"

His Eternal Dao Seed was too powerful, in fact, it was no less than a high-level realm god who condensed eight Eternal Realm Spirits, so the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance had completely lost its effect on him.

"Those Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances are useless to me, let's give them to my wife and children, it should be able to let them condense the fifth perfect level Eternal Realm Spirit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Shortly thereafter.

Ye Tian divided all these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances equally among his wife and two children. []

If he had time, he would go into the Liuhu Realm Rift and collect some more Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material to supply his wife and son, so that they could condense the sixth Eternal Realm Spirit.

However, he also had to find resources for himself that could refine the Eternal Dao Seed, otherwise his cultivation would stagnate.

If you rely on yourself to slowly cultivate and refine the Eternal Dao Seed little by little, even if the cultivation speed is many times faster than that of other Realm Gods, if you want to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, I am afraid it will take infinite years, unimaginable time.

Therefore, he still wanted to find a substance that could replace the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal, as long as it was useful to him and did not damage the foundation of the Eternal Dao Seed.

As for the issue of demonization, he didn't need to worry about it.

"I'm still going to have to ask the Terran intelligence officer at the Realm Court Headquarters to collect more relevant information. "

Ye Tian muttered.

But the position of that intelligence officer is still too low, and he may not have access to too high information and intelligence.

Therefore, he himself had to try to find out as much information as possible, or find resources that could improve his Eternal Dao Seed.

And just like that, the years passed.

Ye Tian would go to the Liuhu Boundary Crack from time to time, kill some demon seeds and come out, and the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material obtained was naturally more and more.

this day.

Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, took the lead in condensing the fifth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, and her strength skyrocketed.

Immediately afterwards, her daughter Ye Xingyue also completed a breakthrough and condensed the fifth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

And his son Ye Xingchen also broke through after him, and 880 condensed the fifth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, but his strength was even stronger, after all, the Eternal Dao Species was stronger, the foundation was stronger, and the combat power was naturally stronger.

The strength of the three of them was condensed in the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak realm gods, but they were weaker than the Eternal Realm God Realm high-level realm gods.

After all, when Ye Tian was cultivating at this time, his combat power was only comparable to that of ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm high-level realm gods, and their foundation was not as good as his, so his combat power was naturally much lower.

But as long as they don't encounter the high-level realm gods and high-level demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm, they can be called invincible in the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

......

"The Dongwu Ancient Sect is going to have a meeting, and all the powerful forces have to send representatives over?"

Ye Tian received the information from the Dongwu Ancient Sect and frowned slightly.

The Dongwu Ancient Sect is the top force in the Dongwu Realm in terms of strength, much stronger than the Taihe Holy Sect and the Jiehe Mountain, and the big and small things in the Dongwu Realm are all managed by the Dongwu Ancient Sect, and the Dongwu Ancient Sect has a certain right to speak in the Boundary Court Headquarters.

Therefore, more than a hundred powerful forces in the Dongwu Realm and seventeen other top forces will give face to the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

It is rare for the Dongwu Ancient Sect to hold such a meeting, and this time there must be something very important and must be visited.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went to the side of the Dongwu Ancient Sect by himself.
